message: Billing profile (organization billing defaults) is not configured.
whyItMatters: The billing profile holds the default billing provider identity used on every 837P claim. Without it, claims cannot be built.
resolution: Fill out the billing profile section on the Organization settings page.

message: Billing provider NPI is missing or not 10 digits.
whyItMatters: The billing provider NPI populates loop 2010AA on the 837P. A missing or malformed NPI rejects the entire claim.
resolution: Enter a valid 10-digit billing provider NPI in the billing profile on the Organization settings page.

message: Billing Tax ID (EIN) is missing or not 9 digits.
whyItMatters: The billing provider Tax ID is the REF*EI segment on the 837P and is required for payer enrollment and tax reporting.
resolution: Enter a valid 9-digit EIN in the billing profile on the Organization settings page.

message: Billing address ZIP is missing or not in 5- or 9-digit format.
whyItMatters: Some payers require the full ZIP+4 on the billing provider address loop and will reject 5-digit or malformed values.
resolution: Enter the ZIP (5 or 9 digits) for the billing address in the billing profile.

message: Billing contact phone is missing or not 10 digits.
whyItMatters: Payers and clearinghouses occasionally call the listed billing phone to resolve transmission issues. Missing it slows down resolution.
resolution: Enter a 10-digit billing contact phone in the billing profile.
